nasb.text: and do not go after other gods to serve them and to worship them, and do not provoke Me to anger with the work of your hands, and I will do you no harm.’

esv.text: Do not go after other gods to serve and worship them, or provoke me to anger with the work of your hands. Then I will do you no harm.’

cnv.text: “你們不要隨從別的神，不要事奉敬拜他們，也不可容你們手所作的惹我發怒；這樣，我就不會使禍患臨到你們。

ccb.text: 不要随从、供奉、祭拜其他神明，不要制造神像惹耶和华发怒，免得祂惩罚你们。’”
